text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Health/Disability Related Support Groups * AIDS/HIV Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Amputations Autism Spectrum Disorder Blindness Deafness Hard of Hearing Parkinson's Disease AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE LANE COUNTY SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support groups for people living with HIV and their families with group meetings, food, activities, and referrals to community resources. 1195 City View Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their families Hours: Call for current schedule Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE SUPPORT GROUPS
